sglang.title: Add OLMo model
sglang.author: janimo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Support for OLMo models
Note: Only the new ones with -hf suffix are supported, not the old ones built before OLMo was integrated into transformers, those are deprecated and have an extra package requirement.
https://huggingface.co/collections/allenai/olmo-suite-65aeaae8fe5b6b2122b46778

sglang.title: Add a new event loop
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Add a new event loop that is more friendly for overlapping. You can turn on it with --enable-overlap-schedule

sglang.title: Fix srt dependency
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
vllm version specification is not working

sglang.title: Launch a thread to overlap CPU and GPU
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Launch a thread to overlap CPU schedule and GPU computation for the overlapping version of the event loop.

sglang.title: Returning a per request metric for number of cached_tokens read
sglang.author: havetc
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Right now sglang uses an advanced radix cache system, but it is not possible to know for each request how many of the
tokens were computed, or read from the cache. This pull request offer a way to easily return this information

Modifications
Most important edit is to the UsageInfo struct

sglang.title: add orjson for jsonresponse
sglang.author: michaelfeil
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
ORJson allows for faster JSON serialization of responses.
This could reduce latency and help reducing the cpu overhead.
I heavily use it for in infinity, e.g. https://github.com/michaelfeil/infinity/blob/4e380e110b72e61a159108dabfbd1fa27506883c/libs/infinity_emb/infinity_emb/infinity_serv

sglang.title: Add date to logging messages (#1623)
sglang.author: zeng-zc
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Please refer to #1623
Modifications

add date to engine logging
add more info to uvicorn logging

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutoria

sglang.title: Update the transformers version in CI
sglang.author: merrymercy

vllm.title: [Core] Rename input data types
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
More changes split out from #6869:

LLMInputs to TokenInputs (preprocessing), SingletonInputs (sequence) or DecoderOnlyInputs (VLM processors)

LLMInputs import will remain available for one release before being removed entirely.


EncoderDecoderLLMInputs to EncoderDecoderInputs

EncoderDecoderLLMIn

vllm.title: [Misc] Consolidate example usage of OpenAI client for multimodal models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR consolidates the examples for running inference on multimodal models with OpenAI client to one place, and adds a text-only case for functionality check.
Eventually we will add examples for other media type (e.g., video) in this file too.

vllm.title: Support mistral interleaved attn
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Allow mistral models with interleaved attention patterns to be run-able in vLLM. For now we'll have to cap the max model length to the minimum of the allowed attention pattern until we figure out how to cleanly support interleaved attention pattern (similar to Gemma)

vllm.title: [Kernel][Model] Improve continuous batching for Jamba and Mamba
vllm.author: mzusman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Mamba kernels now avoid writing/reading to/from padded cache entries
Jamba now uses the previously implemented functionality for continuous batching in #8012 #8039 #8533

CC @tlrmchlsmth

vllm.title: [Performance][Spec Decode] Optimize ngram lookup performance
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt: After benchmarking the performance of ngram in vllm, it seems that the proposal time is longer than expected. The main reason is that there are (1) CPU <-> GPU communication when building the ngram lookup table. (2) Building the ngram contains many small kernels (duration < 5 microseconds) as show b

vllm.title: [CI/Build] mypy: Resolve some errors from checking vllm/engine
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a chunk of mypy checking progress.


I got to where I knew everything would pass when running mypy with
--follow-imports skip.  (though some new issues have crept back in since I passed this point)


I then started working on expanding the coverage for what can be checked
using --follow-i

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Prevent integer overflow in fp8 dynamic per-token quantize kernel
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After seeing #9391, I ran grep -r "token_idx \* hidden_size" csrc, and found that the same 32-bit integer overflow may happen in the fp8 dynamic quantize kernel as well.
This PR prevents this from happening by using int64_t instead

vllm.title: [BugFix] [Kernel] Fix GPU SEGV occurring in int8 kernels
